title: Balaji Mandir Ketkawla
tagline: Balaji Mandir Ketkawla — spiritual town of Maharashtra

overview.short: Balaji Temple of Ketkawle, is copy of the original Tirumala Venkateswara Temple located 60 km from Pune, Maharashtra.
overview.description: Balaji Temple of Ketkawle, is copy of the original Tirumala Venkateswara Temple located 60 km from Pune, Maharashtra. It is on Pune-Bangalore highway.

topPlaces.name: Nasrapur
topPlaces.description: Nasrapur is a village located 13 kilometres (8.1 mi) from Bhor Taluka in the Pune District of Maharashtra, India. It is located 36 kilometres (22 mi) south of Pune, the district headquarters, and 160 kilometres (99 mi) from the state capital, Mumbai.

topPlaces.name: Purandar Fort
topPlaces.description: Purandar Fort is a mountain fort in Pune district in the Western Indian state of Maharashtra, India. The fort stands at 1,374 metres (4,508 ft) above sea level in the Western Ghats, 50 kilometres (31 mi) to the southeast of Pune.

items.note: Nasrapur is a village located 13 kilometres (8.1 mi) from Bhor Taluka in the Pune District of Maharashtra, India. It is located 36 kilometres (22 mi) south of Pune, the district headquarters, and 160 kilometres (99 mi) from the state capital, Mumbai.

Purandar Fort is a mountain fort in Pune district in the Western Indian state of Maharashtra, India. The fort stands at 1,374 metres (4,508 ft) above sea level in the Western Ghats, 50 kilometres (31 mi) to the southeast of Pune.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Balaji Mandir Ketkawla?
faq.a: The best time to visit Balaji Mandir Ketkawla is Oct – Mar. Summers are 26–40°C and winters are 12–28°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Balaji Mandir Ketkawla?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Pune Airport (36 km) and the nearest railway station is Pune Junction (31 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Balaji Mandir Ketkawla?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Balaji Mandir Ketkawla at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Balaji Mandir Ketkawla?
faq.a: Stays in Balaji Mandir Ketkawla start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Balaji Mandir Ketkawla?
faq.a: The top attractions are Nasrapur, Purandar Fort.
